description: A proteomics method to propogate identifed peptides across multiple MS runs
author: Vincent Fusaro
plan:
## LandmarkMatch GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
LandmarkMatch is a GenePattern module that A proteomics method to propogate identifed peptides across multiple MS runs

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: peakList.filename, retentionTime.filename, sampleInfo.filename, globalID.filename, Bootstrap, running.on.LSF
- Optional: accurateMass.filename, prefitCoef.filename

### 3. Command Line
```
<perl> <libdir>LandmarkMatch.pl <libdir> <os.name> <peakList.filename> <retentionTime.filename> <sampleInfo.filename> <globalID.filename> <Bootstrap> <running.on.LSF> <accurateMass.filename> <prefitCoef.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: retentionTime.filename
parameters.description: Zip file containing retention time (in this case from mapquant)

parameters.name: sampleInfo.filename
parameters.description: CSV file with header\: experiment, sample, class

parameters.name: accurateMass.filename
parameters.description: OPTIONAL\: Specify the accurate mass table

parameters.name: prefitCoef.filename
parameters.description: OPTIONAL\: Specify the prefit coefficients in a file

parameters.name: Bootstrap
parameters.description: Use bootstrapping to calculate landmark match statistics

parameters.name: running.on.LSF
parameters.description: Whether you are running on an LSF cluster version of GenePattern
